_meta.source: Primary sources: commonapp.org, admission.universityofcalifornia.edu, calstate.edu/apply, goapplytexas.org, coalitionforcollegeaccess.org

common_app.label: Common App
common_app.opens: Annually on Aug 1 (accounts roll over — the Common App tab and personal essay survive the refresh)
common_app.essay: Personal essay 250-650 words (7 prompts) + college-specific supplements
common_app.recommendations: Counselor + typically 1-2 teacher evaluations (per-college counts in the Requirements Grid)
common_app.fee_model: Per college ($0-$90); fee waivers via the Common App profile

uc.label: University of California
uc.opens: Aug 1; firm filing window Oct 1 - Nov 30
uc.essay: 4 Personal Insight Questions (350 words each) chosen from 8 — answers, not essays
uc.fee_model: Per campus selected; fee waivers up to 4 campuses
uc.notes: Test-free (SAT/ACT never considered). UC runs plagiarism and AI checks on PIQs.

applytexas.label: ApplyTexas
applytexas.opens: Typically July for the following fall
applytexas.essay: Essay requirements vary by campus (UT Austin requires essays)
applytexas.notes: Texas top-10% automatic admission for state residents.

coalition_scoir.label: Coalition on Scoir
coalition_scoir.opens: Rolling account creation; college deadlines match their Common App dates where dual-listed
coalition_scoir.coverage: Coalition member colleges (many are also Common App members)

institutional.label: College's own portal
institutional.coverage: Colleges that don't use a shared application
